taxon.author: (Taczanowski, 1874)
taxon.distribution: North America. Introduced to St. Helena, Africa, Czechia, Iran, Sri Lanka, China, Japan, Philippines, Indonesia, Australia, Pacific Is., Galapagos

referenceObject.reference: Taczanowski, L. (1874). Les aranéides de la Guyane française. Horae Societatis Entomologicae Rossicae 10: 56-115, pl. 2.
